block_details.reason: TP1 is a PARTIAL close (tp1_close_pct=0.5 per position_manager.py:73). Adding TP1 to _FULL_CLOSE would record a full-close outcome for a still-open trailing position, corrupting all 7 feedback signals.
block_details.correct_fix: Accumulate partial_close_pnl in position object at TP1 hit, pass total P&L (TP1_partial + trailing_close) to record_outcome() at trailing close.

tp1_partial_close_insight.description: TP1 closes 50% of position (+$122/trade avg). Trailing half exits at -$0.34/trade. Net full-trade P&L for TP1+trailing path: ~+$60.83/trade. Feedback systems only see -$0.34 (trailing portion), missing $61/trade of winner signal.
tp1_partial_close_insight.impact: Feedback underestimates winner quality by ~$61/trade on 111 trailing exits/100d

daily_synthesis.new_anomaly_this_run: TP1_FEEDBACK_BLACKOUT_REAL — but proposed fix wrong. Correct fix: cumulative P&L instrumentation.

high_priority_findings.finding: Run85 audit proposed TP1 -> _FULL_CLOSE (conf=95%) but BLOCKED: TP1 is a partial close (50% position). Correct fix: cumulative P&L instrumentation across TP1-partial + trailing-close lifecycle. Affects all 7 feedback systems.
high_priority_findings.action: Implement TP1_CUMULATIVE_PNL_INSTRUMENTATION — accumulate partial P&L in position object, pass total to record_outcome() at trailing close.
